{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The Snail agent called Angry Roar came from the pet dimension far away. They were once trapped in a small sphere and forced to fight monsters. After they learned how to increase in size, they knocked their owner unconscious and ran away.
|affct=ART
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1791
|relic1=Fungus XL
|relic2=Prehistoric Fossil
|relic3=Golden Chariot
|relic4=Deity Quetzalcoatl
|relic5=Jormungandr Scale
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=2
|form=Dragon
|element=Wind
|realm=Britland
|orangehard=HP
}}
